author: codex
scope: Applied subagent-reviewed deterministic spreadsheet preview sidecars for 10 not-ready spreadsheet sources after a clean wave41 generated-output checkpoint, refreshed readiness, and started the reopened ready pool as detached wave42.

reviewed_by_subagent.confirmation: No edits, provider-backed commands, Chandra/vLLM/OCR touches.

mutation_mechanism: bun packages/cli/src/cli.ts source-prep-apply-preview <source_id> --run-id spreadsheet-backlog-20260623; writes raw/sources/<source_id>/text.txt and blocks.jsonl from reviewed data/source-prep sidecars

sources.hazard: Real-estate tax workbook; Excel serial dates, long floats, formula/error-looking cells.
Statement of operations; raw numeric floats, monthly/YTD sheets.
Real-estate tax workbook; Excel serial dates, long floats, 25vFFP/24v25 sheet labels.
Real-estate tax workbook; raw formula/float/date-serial hazards.
Statement of operations; raw calculated decimals, monthly/YTD sheets.
Statement of operations; raw calculated decimals, monthly/YTD sheets.

verification.repo_secret_scan_after_launch: rg for Pioneer key fragments returned no matches

readiness_after_apply.interpretation: The reopened 10-source pool came from batch016 and was launched as wave42.

ingest_started.command_template: PIONEER_API_KEY='<PIONEER_API_KEY>' MTA_MATERIALIZE_EVERY=100000 setsid -f bun packages/cli/src/cli.ts campaign ingest --wave 42 --id validation-2026-06 --size 10 --concurrency 10 --timeout-min 300 --profile pioneer-deepseek-flash
